bio: Based in Porto, Portugal. Engineer by profession, hiker and photographer by passion. For me, photography and hiking belong together — the best images often come after a long walk, a steep climb, or simply taking the time to explore a place quietly. I’m drawn to landscapes, nature, and peaceful scenes, usually far from crowds, always chasing good light.
Canon shooter since 2018 (EOS R7). Edited in Lightroom.
